samples.label: before
samples.bodyText:
THE WEDDING OF
Imam Nandira
SATURDAY, 9TH DECEMBER 202X
Dear,
We apologize if there i  any mi pelling of name or title
LET'S OPEN
Two are better than one becau e they have a good reward for their toil. For if they fall, one will lift up hi  fellow. But woe to him who i  alone when he fall  and ha  not another to lift him up! Again, if two lie together, they keep warm, but how can one keep warm alone? And though a man might prevail again t one who i  alone, two will with tand him
ECCLESIASTES 4:9
